SOFTWARE LICENSE AGREEMENT

This Software License Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of [DATE_1]
(the "Effective Date") by and between:

(1) [ORGANIZATION_1], a [ADDRESS_1] corporation
    with its principal place of business at 1209 [PERSON_1], Wilmington, DE 19801,
    EIN: 87-2451993
    (the "Licensor"), represented by its Chief Executive Officer,
    [PERSON_2]; and

(2) [ORGANIZATION_2], a [ADDRESS_3] limited liability company
    with offices at 200 [PERSON_3], [ADDRESS_3], NY 10282,
    EIN: 13-3994801
    (the "Licensee"), represented by its Managing Director,
    Dr. [PERSON_4].

Recitals
Licensor has developed certain proprietary analytics software ("Software") and
is willing to grant Licensee a license under the terms set forth herein.
Licensee desires to obtain such a license to integrate the Software with its
[ORGANIZATION_3] treasury operations and to deploy it across the Acme &
Company Holdings group of subsidiaries.

1. License Grant. Subject to the terms of this Agreement, Licensor hereby grants
   to Licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software
   solely for internal business purposes.

2. Fees. Licensee shall pay Licensor an annual license fee of [MONETARY_AMOUNT_1]
   (one million two hundred fifty thousand U.S. dollars), payable to the
   account designated by Licensor ([ORGANIZATION_4], routing 121000248,
   account [TAX_IDENTIFICATION_NUMBER_1]).

3. Notices. Any notice required hereunder shall be sent to the following
   addresses:
   If to Licensor: [ORGANIZATION_1], Attn: [PERSON_5],
   1209 [PERSON_1], Wilmington, DE 19801; with a copy to general counsel
   at [EMAIL_ADDRESS_1].
   If to Licensee: [ORGANIZATION_2], Attn: General Counsel,
   200 [PERSON_3], [ADDRESS_3], NY 10282; phone: ([PHONE_NUMBER_1]

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the
Effective Date.

LICENSOR: [ORGANIZATION_1]        LICENSEE: [ORGANIZATION_2]
By: ____________________________         By: ____________________________
Name: [PERSON_6]                   Name: [PERSON_4]
Title: Chief Executive Officer           Title: Managing Director
Date: [DATE_1]                  Date: [DATE_1]
